narrativeProgression.summary: A dead account sends a fresh attachment with current geotag residue.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: Dispatch pushes a crime scene map to SMS while social channels spread contradictory alibis.

threadUpdates.update: First Snow Body: Dispatch pushes a crime scene map to SMS while social channels spread contradictory alibis.
Peripheral signal tied to Anonymous tip voicemail remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
A plausible shortcut appears: Protect survivor vs bait killer with false lead.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Red Creek Winter - Day 04 text message screenshot
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Anonymous tip voicemail.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Red Creek Winter ARG artifact Day 04. Type: text_message_screenshot. Clue focus: Anonymous tip voicemail. Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Red Creek Winter text_message_screenshot audio cue for day 4. Clue anchor: Anonymous tip voicemail. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Anonymous tip voicemail and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_03.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Anonymous tip voicemail.

puzzle.title: Day 04 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Anonymous tip voicemail.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with ANON.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.

distraction.title: Red Herring 04
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Anonymous tip voicemail with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
